title: Roasted Springy Spaghetti Pastry
description: A springy and flavorful twist on traditional pasta, featuring roasted vegetables and a crispy pastry crust. This dish is perfect for a sick day, as it's easy to make and can be prepared in a comal, making it shojin-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. In a large bowl, toss the sliced zucchini and carrots with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
In a separate bowl, combine the cooked spaghetti, chopped parsley, and grated Parmesan cheese.
Place the mixture on a lightly floured surface and shape into a rectangle, about 1/4-inch thick.
Transfer the rectangle to a comal and cook over medium heat for 2-3 minutes, or until the edges start to crisp.
Transfer the comal to the preheated oven and roast for 12-15 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and crispy.

axes.dishForm: Pastry is not a typical Croatian dish form, so I chose Pastry has been replaced to fit the bill more closely.
